name: Eastern Fantasy RP
description: Welcome to the Eastern Fantasy RP! Journey through a fantasy world inspired by the history and mythology of China, Japan, Mongolia, and more. Cross swords with samurai, pursue cultivation alongside monks, or scheme your way through the Imperial court in a world full of danger, opportunity, and magic. Pursue your own story and make the most of your life. Will you rise to the heights of power, or remain obscured in the shadows? Will you be a virtuous person, or pursue vice and worldly pleasures? The choice is yours and the world waits with baited breath to see how you will shape the lives with those around you. Good luck, have fun, and remember, even Heaven is not the limit!
creator: Hynvyr
